content:
Leo July 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Home and community — birthday season opens; Jupiter in your sign keeps the year generous
Key Dates New Moon Jul 13 (Cancer, 12th house) / Mercury Rx ends Jul 23 / Full Moon Jul 29 (Aquarius, 7th house)
Love The Aquarius Full Moon in your 7th brings a partnership climax
Career Jupiter in your sign keeps expanding; Mercury Rx ends Jul 23 — launch windows open
Crystal of the Month Rose Quartz
Lucky Colors Gold, rose, warm coral
Lucky Number 1
Affirmation I let the year of me open; the partnership that fits is on its way.

This Month’s Energy

Leo, July 2026 is your launch month. Jupiter is now in your sign (since June 29), keeping the year’s biggest expansion wave active. Mercury remains retrograde in Cancer (your 12th house of rest and the unconscious) until July 23 — so the first three weeks still favor inner work over outer launch. The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 also falls in your 12th house, doubling the rest-and-release emphasis. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, and your birthday season opens fully as the Sun enters Leo. The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 lights up your 7th house of partnership — the year’s biggest relationship climax. July’s job is to rest early, then launch into the year of you and the partnership it asks for.

Key Dates for Leo in July 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Leo Do / Avoid
Jul 13 New Moon in Cancer 12th house — rest, retreat, release before your birthday season; dream work, closure, letting go Do: take a retreat day, journal on what to release, sleep more
Avoid: launching new initiatives, pushing visibility
Jul 23 Mercury turns direct Mercury Rx in your 12th finally ends — inner fog lifts, rest needs ease, energy returns Do: make the launch announcement, declare the year’s intention, sign the contract (carefully)
Avoid: expecting instant clarity — give it a few days
Jul 29 Full Moon in Aquarius (Buck Moon) 7th house — partnership, marriage, significant others climax; a commitment, breakup, or renegotiation peaks Do: name the relationship truth, accept the commitment, document partnership agreements
Avoid: rushing a partnership decision without review
Jul 1–22 Mercury Rx continues (Cancer, 12th house) Inner fog continues; old patterns, dreams, and unprocessed material surface Do: rest, journal, dream work, energy work, therapy
Avoid: major public announcements, signing contracts
Jul 5 Venus enters Gemini 11th house Venus — friendship, community, future-vision as love; a friend becomes more Do: host the gathering, accept the invitation, network upward
Avoid: isolating when allies are available
Jul 22 Sun enters Leo 1st house season — your birthday season begins; energy returns, the year of you opens Do: celebrate, set the year’s intention, step into visibility
Avoid: over-scheduling; let it build gradually

Career & Money

For Leo, July’s first three weeks continue the rest-and-prep window. Mercury Rx in your 12th house means inner work, not outer launches. Use the early weeks to plan, rest, and prepare. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, just as your birthday season opens. This is one of the year’s best launch windows.

Jupiter is now in your sign, keeping the year’s biggest expansion wave active. Promotions, public recognition, going out on your own, becoming more visible — all favored. The Sun in Leo from July 22 amplifies the wave. Crystals for wealth can support the mindset; the practical move is patient preparation through Mercury Rx, then bold action after July 23.

Love & Relationships

The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 falls in your 7th house of partnership — for Leo, this is the year’s biggest relationship climax. For coupled Leos, a commitment deepens, renews, or reaches a turning point. For single Leos, an important person may enter the picture. Either way, the Full Moon asks what partnership you’re ready to actually commit to.

Venus entering Gemini on July 5 (your 11th house) supports friendship and community as love — a friend becomes more, a network welcomes you. Jupiter in your sign amplifies your magnetism all year. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting the right partnership amplify your signal, not dilute it.

Health & Wellness

July’s first three weeks are still a 12th house rest window for Leo. Mercury Rx in your 12th means inner fog, fatigue, and unprocessed material. Honor it — rest, journal, dream work, therapy. Many Leos will need more sleep than usual in early July.

The Sun entering Leo on July 22 (your 1st house) returns your energy and vitality. Rose Quartz, your crystal of the month, holds the heart steady as the year of you opens. Combined with Jupiter in your sign, this is your best wellness-launch window of the year — set the body practice, the self-care ritual, the identity commitment you’ll carry through the year. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Rose Quartz

Why Rose Quartz fits Leo this month. You are Sun-ruled, and July opens with your annual visibility-and-birthday wave — but the first three weeks are still a 12th-house rest window, and the 7th-house Full Moon on July 29 brings partnership to the foreground. Rose Quartz, traditionally tied to unconditional love, the heart chakra, and emotional harmony, is the stone that opens your heart to receive the year’s partnerships. Where Sunstone (June’s stone) warmed you for Jupiter’s arrival, Rose Quartz opens the heart for the partnerships Jupiter now brings.

How to use it during July 2026. Place Rose Quartz over your heart for 10 minutes of breathing each morning from July 1 through July 22 (Mercury Rx in your 12th). Wear it as a pendant during your birthday season and through the 7th-house Full Moon on July 29.

Best date to use it: July 29, the Aquarius Full Moon in your 7th house — Rose Quartz over your heart for 10 minutes of breathing before any partnership conversation that day.

Read more: Rose Quartz Meaning and Best Crystals for Leo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Leo — July 2026

When: July 29, the Aquarius Full Moon in your 7th house.
Crystal: Rose Quartz.
Intention: Open the heart for the partnership the year of you is asking for.

  1. Cleanse Rose Quartz under cool running water for 30 seconds on the evening of July 29.
  2. Set the intention on the 7th house theme: write down one truth about the partnership you’re ready for — what it looks like, what it asks, what you’ll give.
  3. Act by having one honest partnership conversation within 30 days of the Full Moon. Rose Quartz in your pocket during the talk.
  4. Reflect at the next New Moon (August): what did opening the heart reveal, and what does the year of you ask next? Carry Rose Quartz during the review.

Shop Leo Crystals for July 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Leo crystal guide for stones connected with confidence, leadership, love, and visibility — including the Rose Quartz that opens your heart during your birthday season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Leo July 2026

Is July 2026 a good month for Leo?

Yes — your month. The first three weeks are still rest and prep (Mercury Rx in your 12th house). Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, your birthday season opens, and the year’s biggest partnership climax arrives with the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29.

How should Leo handle Mercury Rx (in your 12th house, continuing from June) until July 23?

It’s a rest-and-inner-work window. Sleep more, journal, dream work, and avoid major public announcements. The fog lifts on July 23 — and Jupiter in your sign keeps the year generous.

What does the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 mean for Leo love life?

It falls in your 7th house of partnership — the year’s biggest relationship climax. Couples may deepen or renew; singles may meet someone significant. Name the partnership truth.

What is the best crystal for Leo in July 2026?

Rose Quartz — it opens the heart for the partnerships your birthday year and Jupiter are bringing. See the full Leo crystal guide →

How does Jupiter in Leo continue to affect Leo in July?

Jupiter stays in your sign for ~12 months (since June 29), so the expansion wave is active all year. July is your launch month — birthday season, Mercury direct from July 23, and a partnership climax on July 29.

Should Leo launch a project in July 2026?

Wait until after July 23 if possible. Mercury Rx in your 12th house scrambles the inner foundation that any launch needs. After July 23, your birthday season opens — and Jupiter in your sign keeps the launch energy generous through May 2027.
